title: ADULT AND SENIOR PROGRAMS - 211info
text: YMCA OF BAKER COUNTY ADULT AND SENIOR PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of programs to improve the health of adults and seniors, including group fitness classes and group sports. Also offers a diabetes prevention program and support/instruction for adults with Parkinson's and other neurological diseases. Members have open use of the swim center and fitness center. 3715 Pocahontas Road Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by service (541) 523-8328 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Swim Center (541) 523-8328 Fitness Center (541) 523-9622 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Membership rates vary but are discounted for seniors and veterans DOCUMENTS: Military ID if applying for military discount program AREA SERVED: Baker County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 6am-6pm, Saturday 8am-4pm Services: Chronic Disease Self Management Programs Exercise Classes/Groups Physical Activity and Fitness Education/Promotion Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - CAMPS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YMCA OF BAKER COUNTY
